introSection: Wild Beetle Race was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Pirate's World in Dania, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wild Beetle Race opened with the park in 1967.

The ride closed in 1973 and was standing but not operating from 1974 through 1975 or later.

fullText:
Wild Beetle Race was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Pirate's World in Dania, Florida, USA.

Wild Beetle Race opened with the park in 1967.

The ride closed in 1973 and was standing but not operating from 1974 through 1975 or later.
